title: Dap Hartmann
text: Home * People * Dap Hartmann Dap Hartmann [1] Lambertus (Dap) Hartmann , a Dutch astronomer, publicist, computer chess programmer, and associate professor at Delft Centre for Entrepreneurship, Delft University of Technology . He holds a Ph.D. in astronomy from Leiden University in 1994 on the distribution of atomic hydrogen in the Milky Way [2] , and after scientific research in that field at Harvard University , the University of Bonn , and the Max Planck Institute , he made the transition to innovation management and the valorization of new technologies, and teaches at TU Delft. Along with Peter Kouwenhoven , Dap Hartmann is co-author of the chess program Dappet . In the computer chess world, he is known as eponym of the Butterfly Boards and inventor of the related Butterfly Heuristic [3] (even if he denied implementation [4] ), and his interesting articles and reviews in the ICCA Journal .
